ddls:
CREATE TABLE "epidemiological_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data is collected */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target metric being measured */,
  "data_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the unit of measurement */,
  "bin_start_incl" INTEGER /* Start of the bin (inclusive) */,
  "bin_end_notincl" INTEGER /* End of the bin (exclusive) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., specific health department, research team) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "confidence_level" TEXT /* Confidence level of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "geographical_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) for precise location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_data_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_epidemiological_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., US National) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region within the country */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "health_department" TEXT /* Health department responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target metric */,
  "target_name" TEXT /* Name of the target metric (e.g., Season onset) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the target metric */,
  "target_category" TEXT /* Category of the target metric (e.g., onset, incidence, prevalence) */,
  "target_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the target metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Point, Bin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "data_type_category" TEXT /* Category of the data type (e.g., point, bin, range) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., week, month) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_category" TEXT /* Category of the unit (e.g., time, count) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., epidemiologist, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validations" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record being validated */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the validation */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date when the validation was performed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the validation (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the validation */,
  "validation_type" TEXT /* Type of validation (e.g., manual, automated) */,
  "validation_tool" TEXT /* Tool or method used for validation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES epidemiological_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validations_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
